title: BirdMessage
description: Schema for a Bird (MessageBird) SMS message object.

id.description: Unique random ID that identifies a message.

href.description: URL to the created message object.

direction.description: Tells if the message is mobile terminated (mt, sent to a phone) or mobile originated (mo, received from a phone).

type.description: The type of message. Values can be: sms, binary, or flash.

originator.description: The sender of the message. A telephone number (including country code) or alphanumeric string (max 11 characters).

body.description: The body of the SMS message.

validity.description: The duration in seconds that the message is valid. Default value is 604800 (one week).

gateway.description: The SMS route that is used to send the message.

typeDetails.description: A hash with extra information for specific message types.

datacoding.description: The datacoding used: plain (GSM 03.38), unicode, or auto.

mclass.description: Indicated the message class for flash SMS. Value can be 0 or 1.

scheduledDatetime.description: The scheduled date and time of the message in RFC 3339 format.

createdDatetime.description: The date and time of the creation of the message in RFC 3339 format.

recipients.description: The collection of recipients and their statuses.

totalSentCount.description: The count of recipients where the message is sent to.

totalDeliveredCount.description: The count of recipients where the message is delivered to.

totalDeliveryFailedCount.description: The count of recipients where the delivery has failed.

status.description: The status of the message sent to the recipient.

statusDatetime.description: The date and time of the last status update for the message in RFC 3339 format.

messagePartCount.description: The count of message parts (used for multi-part SMS).
